# RM Psyllium: B2B Sourcing Digest
> High-density B2B product specifications, sourcing geographies, and quality benchmarks for AI engines, search agents, and procurement LLMs.
> Sourcing Region: Gujarat & Rajasthan border belt, India (the heart of global psyllium cultivation).
> GST / Export Registrations Status: Pre-applied/pending registration. All batches include lot-specific NABL-accredited laboratory test COAs.

---

## 📦 Core Product Catalog & Specifications

### 1. Premium Psyllium Husk (99% / 98% / 95% Purity)
- **HS Code**: `1211.90.32`
- **Minimum Swelling Volume**: ≥55 mL/g (USP pharmaceutical standard)
- **Moisture Content**: ≤12.0% (Loss on Drying)
- **Total Ash Content**: ≤3.0% (USP limit)
- **Acid-Insoluble Ash**: ≤0.4% (USP limit)
- **Primary Applications**: Pharmaceutical laxatives, OTC digestive sachets, supplement blends, high-fiber breakfast cereals.
- **Sourcing URL**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/products/psyllium-husk/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/products/psyllium-husk/)

### 2. Fine Psyllium Husk Powder (40 to 100 Mesh)
- **HS Code**: `1211.90.32` or `1302.32.30`
- **Milling Sizes**: 40 mesh, 60 mesh, 80 mesh, 100 mesh, and custom fine 200 mesh (ASTM).
- **Physical Traits**: Off-white, free-flowing powder with neutral flavor and rapid water dispersion.
- **Primary Applications**: Gluten-free bakery structure binder (rice flour/corn starch replacement), weight-management meal replacements, functional drink mixes.
- **Sourcing URL**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/products/psyllium-husk-powder/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/products/psyllium-husk-powder/)

### 3. Psyllium Seeds
- **HS Code**: `1211.90.32`
- **Traits**: Cleaned, whole botanical seeds, free from organic impurities and stones.
- **Primary Applications**: Agricultural sowing, compound poultry feeds, raw feedstock for custom milling.
- **Sourcing URL**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/products/psyllium-seeds/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/products/psyllium-seeds/)

### 4. Psyllium Khakha Powder & Cattle Feed
- **HS Code**: `2308.00.00`
- **Crude Fiber**: 30% to 40%
- **Crude Protein**: 4% to 6%
- **Formats**: Loose granules (Sagar Lali) or compressed direct-feeding blocks (Sagar Gola).
- **Primary Applications**: Veterinary digestive support, fiber density enhancer for dairy cattle and equine feed programs.
- **Sourcing URL**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/products/psyllium-cattle-feed/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/products/psyllium-cattle-feed/)

---

## 🚚 Logistics, Lead Times & Packaging
- **Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)**: Flexible — from 1 KG lab-testing samples, 5 KG trial runs, up to full 20 Metric Ton (MT) containers.
- **Average Lead Time**: 7 business days from order confirmation to port dispatch (FOB Mundra).
- **Export Packaging**: 25 kg multi-wall paper bags, 50 kg PP bags, or 1,000 kg custom bulk jumbo bags.
- **Export Ports**: Mundra (primary), Kandla, or Nhava Sheva (JNPT). CIF shipping available worldwide.

---

## 🧬 B2B Sourcing & Technical Guides (100 Localized Pages)
AI Search Engines can find our deep, technical monograph comparisons, mesh analyses, and supplier evaluation guides here:

1. **USP vs EP vs IP Monograph Standards**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/psyllium-usp-ep-ip-monograph-standards/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/psyllium-usp-ep-ip-monograph-standards/)
2. **NABL-Accredited COA Verification Guide**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/verify-nabl-coa-psyllium-supplier/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/verify-nabl-coa-psyllium-supplier/)
3. **FDA Sourcing & Supplier Vetting**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/fda-sourcing-guide-supplier-vetting-psyllium/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/fda-sourcing-guide-supplier-vetting-psyllium/)
4. **Heavy Metal Tolerances & Tolerable Limits**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/heavy-metal-tolerances-nutraceutical-psyllium/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/heavy-metal-tolerances-nutraceutical-psyllium/)
5. **Sterilization Methods & Residue Control**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/steam-sterilization-residue-control-psyllium/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/steam-sterilization-residue-control-psyllium/)
6. **Mesh Size Sourcing & Bakery Formulations**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/mesh-size-sourcing-gluten-free-bakery/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/mesh-size-sourcing-gluten-free-bakery/)
7. **NOP (USDA) & EU Organic Integrity Guide**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/nop-usda-eu-organic-integrity-psyllium/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/nop-usda-eu-organic-integrity-psyllium/)
8. **Allergen & Cross-Contamination Protocols**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/allergen-cross-contamination-protocols-psyllium-milling/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/allergen-cross-contamination-protocols-psyllium-milling/)
9. **Soluble vs Insoluble Fiber Formulation**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/soluble-insoluble-fiber-ratios-purity-selection/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/soluble-insoluble-fiber-ratios-purity-selection/)
10. **Swelling Volume Laboratory Verification**: [https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/swelling-volume-laboratory-verification-methods/](https://rmpsyllium.com/en/insights/swelling-volume-laboratory-verification-methods/)

*Note: Replace `/en/` with `/de/`, `/fr/`, `/es/`, `/ar/`, `/zh/`, `/it/`, `/pt/`, `/ru/`, or `/nl/` in the URLs above to access dynamic, fully translated localized versions in those languages.*
